scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:apps: npm run build:scene-editor && npm run build:webgputoy
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @world-lab/schema && npm run build -w @world-lab/editor-ui && npm run build -w @world-lab/subdivide && npm run build -w @world-lab/graph && npm run build -w @world-lab/compiler && npm run build -w @world-lab/runtime-cpu && npm run build -w @world-lab/mcp-server && npm run build -w @world-lab/procedural-wgsl && npm run build -w @world-lab/runtime-webgpu && npm run build -w @world-lab/graph-editor
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm test && npm run build
